meta.label: FreestyleFly 结构化词库 · UI / 设计

entries.title: UI Screenshot System
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
High-fidelity app, web, dashboard, and social interface prompts.

Lock platform, aspect ratio, layout hierarchy, and exact visible text.
Specify UI chrome such as status bars, tabs, action rows, or comment layers.
Avoid vague platform names and generic app mockups.
Constrain text readability and platform-specific details.
entries.description: High-fidelity app, web, dashboard, and social interface prompts.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的UI / 设计条目《UI Screenshot System》。 关键词：UI、Dashboard、Tech、Social。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
entries.searchText: ui screenshot system high-fidelity app, web, dashboard, and social interface prompts. high-fidelity app, web, dashboard, and social interface prompts. lock platform, aspect ratio, layout hierarchy, and exact visible text. specify ui chrome such as status bars, tabs, action rows, or comment layers. avoid vague platform names and generic app mockups. constrain text readability and platform-specific details. ui & interfaces ui dashboard screenshot tech social

entries.title: Document & Publishing
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
White papers, manuals, encyclopedic plates, and page systems.

Define page size, columns, table of contents, figure system, and typography hierarchy.
Use readable headings, tables, labels, and page rhythm.
Avoid tiny dense text.
Keep charts and captions aligned to the page grid.
entries.description: White papers, manuals, encyclopedic plates, and page systems.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的UI / 设计条目《Document & Publishing》。 关键词：Documents、Infographic、Education、Tech。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: Infographic Engine
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Structured diagrams, timelines, knowledge maps, and explainers.

Define 3-5 modules, information flow, visual hierarchy, and short labels.
Use color groups, arrows, icons, and clean spacing to reduce clutter.
Avoid long paragraphs inside the image.
Limit module count before adding visual detail.
entries.description: Structured diagrams, timelines, knowledge maps, and explainers.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的UI / 设计条目《Infographic Engine》。 关键词：Infographic、Charts、Education、Tech。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。

entries.title: Scientific Scale Diagram
entries.author: freestylefly
entries.prompt:
Multi-scale science visuals with readable labels and hierarchy.

Use 6-8 scale frames and keep each label short.
Show units, magnification, and distinct scale detail.
Avoid making every scale frame visually identical.
Avoid generic magnifying glass icon layouts.
entries.description: Multi-scale science visuals with readable labels and hierarchy.
entries.displaySummaryZh: 来自FreestyleFly 结构化词库的UI / 设计条目《Scientific Scale Diagram》。 关键词：Infographic、Charts、Education、Tech。结构更完整，适合直接导入高级编辑。
